title: stachys herrerae
intro: Stachys herrerae, also known as the blue-witch or mountain betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant contains compounds that may help to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues, providing various health benefits such as improved immune function and reduced inflammation. Stachys herrerae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for a range of health concerns.
